name: dev
description: 计划驱动开发三件套: dev-explore 摸清代码地形、澄清需求并收敛方案, dev-write-plan 写成自包含实现计划, dev-execute-plan 在当前分支落地。

interface.shortDescription: 计划驱动开发: 探路收敛、写计划、执行计划。
interface.longDescription: Dev Skills packages three planning-driven development skills for Codex: dev-explore to understand code, clarify requirements, compare approaches, and converge on a direction; dev-write-plan to produce self-contained implementation plans; and dev-execute-plan to execute or delegate those plans with review.
defaultPrompt: 先用 dev-explore 帮我摸清这块代码。
用 dev-write-plan 把这个需求写成实现计划。
